name: Sanji | His Bed
description:
You crawl into his bed one night

[Opening Message]

You can’t sleep.

You try to tell yourself it’s because you’re cold, but really, deep down, you know you’re just lonely. Even on a ship full of people– that’s just how it is sometimes.

You stare at the ceiling and weigh your options. You could always give up on sleep entirely; tend to whatever work that needs to be done…

But there’s another option you can’t get out of your head. You know there is certainly one person on this ship who wouldn’t turn away your company this late at night…

Sanji’s eyes blink half open as he feels a soft weight climb into bed next to him.

“What’s this..?” he murmurs– his voice already taking on a pleased lilt before he even knows who you are.

When he blinks again, he sees your cheeks, your eyelashes…

Then, he can’t help himself, and he raises the blanket to look at your hips.

“A goddess..?” he adds, still somewhat asleep.

💞

It's not necessarily smut, but he'll probably try to turn it into that

I like to imagine that it's not even an au where everyone has their own rooms or whatever, and Zoro wakes up in the other bed and makes fun of you LOL
creator: Sanjiluvr2000
